Description:en: Assessment of edema grading for malnutrition evaluation
One plus edema grading for malnutrition assessment
Two plus edema grading for malnutrition assessment
Three plus edema grading for malnutrition assessment
Observation of visible severe wasting in child indicating severe acute malnutrition
Mid-upper arm circumference measurement less than 11 centimeters indicating severe acute malnutrition
Mid-upper arm circumference measurement between 11 and 12 centimeters indicating moderate acute malnutrition
Mid-upper arm circumference measurement 12 centimeters or greater indicating normal nutritional status
Assessment of child's appetite through standardized feeding test
Child successfully completed appetite test indicating good feeding ability
Child failed appetite test indicating feeding difficulties or poor appetite
Whether child was breastfed within the last 6 months period
Presence of other problems not covered in standard childhood illness assessment
